comments.text: Completed: build.zig now surfaces only install/uninstall/test/lint plus manual run/tool/bench steps, with test_step wired to Zig test suites only.

comments.text: Completed: README and repo_zig_paths.txt now match the reduced surface exactly.

items.step: Drive the stronger-cut branch to a fixed point with build/test/lint closure, de novo review, one-change challenge, learnings capture, commit, and push
items.notes: Closure bundle is zig build, zig build test --summary none, zig build lint -- --max-warnings 0, exhaustive review loop, then commit/push with SHA parity.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: stronger-cut branch is green under env ZIG_GLOBAL_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/zig-global ZIG_LOCAL_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/zig-local UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache for zig build, zig build test --summary none, and zig build lint -- --max-warnings 0; downstream temp consumer importing shift_compile fails as intended; native review transport remained non-authoritative, so code verdict is anchored to local proof plus direct downstream package check.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Fresh native codex review --base main completed with no discrete actionable regression after the stronger cut; final code verdict is ready with local proof and downstream import-failure receipt.

items.step: Freeze the lexical public contract and cut public shadow surfaces
Promote one canonical lexical semantic spine through manifest, IR, and ProgramPlan

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Attempted to collapse specialist imports off shift_shared by switching shift_compile_api, bundle_envelope_v1, artifact_vm_runtime, and private_modules/* to direct file imports. Reverted after proof failure: Zig module ownership forbids the same file belonging to multiple root modules, so a real st-801 cut needs build-graph module extraction rather than naive direct @import rewiring. Recovery proof: zig build test; zig build lint -- --max-warnings 0 returned green after revert.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: extracted dedicated build modules for artifact_api, public_lowering, and public_ir; rewired shift_shared and shift_compile_api to consume those modules; public_lowering no longer reaches into program_api for test decisions; host-adapter conformance roots now inject host_adapter_v1 explicitly. Proof: zig build test; zig build lint -- --max-warnings 0.

items.step: Route native execution through the canonical spine and remove compat-only runtime plumbing

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: native proof lanes that resolve @import("shift") now bind to shift_mod instead of shift_shared_mod in witness_sources, witness_corpus_test, runtime_contract_suite, and source_lowering_boundary_test. Proof: zig build test; zig build lint -- --max-warnings 0.

items.step: Route hosted execution through internal ArtifactV1 and HostAdapterV1 with compile-time eligibility gates

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: hosted execution is already confined to internal ArtifactV1 plus HostAdapterV1 seams, with fail-closed completion/output/control checks covered by artifact_vm_runtime_test and host_adapter_v1_conformance_test. Proof: zig fmt --check build.zig src test examples; zig build; zig build test; zig build lint -- --max-warnings 0.

Proof: zig fmt --check build.zig src test examples; zig build; zig build test; zig build lint -- --max-warnings 0.

items.step: Archive-tag then delete durable replay and bundle transport from the active branch

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: durable replay and bundle transport were removed from the active branch rather than demoted. Deleted src/durable.zig, src/bundle_envelope_v1.zig, test/durable_session_test.zig, and test/bundle_envelope_v1_test.zig; rewired shift_shared, shift_vm, build.zig, README, and repo_zig_paths.txt to match. Proof: zig fmt --check build.zig src test examples; zig build; zig build test; zig build lint -- --max-warnings 0.

items.step: Rewrite README, shipped examples, and package-boundary proof to the single lexical story

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: README now states the single lexical story, shipped open-row examples use the lexical root where they are meant to be public, and a downstream package-boundary test proves consumers can import only shift while shift_compile stays unavailable as a package module. The harness now self-repairs Zig's suggested consumer fingerprint and uses a relative deps/shift symlink so the probe exercises a real package edge. Proof: zig fmt --check build.zig src test examples; zig build; zig build test; zig build lint -- --max-warnings 0.

items.step: Drive the branch to a fixed point with closure proof, learnings capture, commit, and push

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: closure bundle stayed green on the final candidate (zig fmt --check build.zig src test examples; zig build; zig build test; zig build lint -- --max-warnings 0), learnings appended at lrn-20260413T002848Z-e42460d5, and the substantive branch change shipped as commit f3476dc pushed to origin/feature/fixed-point-campaign.
